text: Hey, good morning. James here from Nova Health Care, North Carolina. I'm calling to let you know about a cashback benefit that may help with out-of-pocket expenses of up to $10,000, especially during a hospital stay. So to check whether you are eligible for this, may I know your age please? Sorry, could you please repeat how old you are? 60. Perfect. You are qualified for the plans. Just hold on for a second, please. Here we go.
